    Sets the statistical confidence multiplier.
    MassBalanceLeakDetector

    Sets the detection averaging or persistence window.
    MassBalanceLeakDetector
    MassBalanceLeakDetector.setFlowMeasurementUncertaintyFraction(double uncertaintyFraction)
    Sets relative flow measurement uncertainty.
    MassBalanceLeakDetector
    MassBalanceLeakDetector.setLinepackVolumeM3(double linepackVolumeM3)
    Sets the linepack volume included in uncertainty calculations.
    MassBalanceLeakDetector
    MassBalanceLeakDetector.setPressureUncertaintyBara(double pressureUncertaintyBara)
    Sets pressure measurement uncertainty.
    MassBalanceLeakDetector
    MassBalanceLeakDetector.setTemperatureUncertaintyK(double temperatureUncertaintyK)
